details: Developed and maintained production web applications using React, Next.js, and TypeScript.
Built REST APIs with NestJS and Express, incorporating JWT authentication.
Integrated PostgreSQL and MongoDB using Prisma ORM.
Assisted deployment workflows and resolved CI/CD issues.
Built responsive UI components using React and Tailwind CSS.
Developed cross-platform mobile screens using Expo.
Connected frontend applications to backend APIs and collaborated in Agile sprints.
